rag_rules: Preserve the existing AADL architecture when inserting AGREE annex blocks
Place component type annexes in valid component type scopes
Place implementation-level bindings in implementation scopes after subcomponents and connections
Use only visible identifiers from the current scope
Do not modify the AADL model structure during fusion
generic_rules: Maintain the original component hierarchy and connections
Preserve all existing subcomponents and their connections
Do not introduce new components or connections during fusion
Ensure all inserted annex blocks are syntactically valid
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};`
Use valid component type scopes for assumptions and guarantees
Use implementation scopes for implementation-level bindings
anti_patterns: Do not place assumptions or guarantees in implementation scopes
Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type scopes
Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts
irrelevant_topics: AADL Property Names Are Not AGREE Variables
